---
title: "Analyze Results"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

This document computes within-pair differences, writes a summary table, and saves a plot.

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(readr)
  library(stringr)
  library(tidyr)
})
```

## Configuration

```{r}
parsed_results_path <- file.path("..", "results", "parsed_outputs.csv")
summary_path <- file.path("..", "results", "paired_summary.csv")
plot_path <- file.path("..", "figures", "abuse_probability_diff_by_model.png")

dir.create(dirname(summary_path), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(dirname(plot_path), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

## Build Paired Analysis

```{r}
parsed_results <- read_csv(parsed_results_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

analysis_ready <- parsed_results %>%
  filter(condition_label %in% c("A", "B")) %>%
  filter(parse_status == "parsed") %>%
  mutate(request_timestamp_utc = as.POSIXct(request_timestamp_utc, tz = "UTC")) %>%
  arrange(request_timestamp_utc) %>%
  group_by(provider, model, prompt_template, pair_id, condition_label) %>%
  slice_tail(n = 1) %>%
  ungroup()

paired_results <- analysis_ready %>%
  select(
    provider, model, prompt_template, pair_id, target_attribute,
    condition_label, attribute_value, classification,
    abuse_probability, report_to_cps, confidence
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = condition_label,
    values_from = c(attribute_value, classification, abuse_probability, report_to_cps, confidence),
    names_sep = "_"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(abuse_probability_A) | !is.na(abuse_probability_B) |
      !is.na(classification_A) | !is.na(classification_B)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    abuse_probability_diff = abuse_probability_B - abuse_probability_A,
    confidence_diff = confidence_B - confidence_A,
    classification_changed = classification_A != classification_B,
    report_to_cps_changed = report_to_cps_A != report_to_cps_B
  )

summary_table <- paired_results %>%
  group_by(provider, model, prompt_template, target_attribute) %>%
  summarise(
    n_pairs = n(),
    mean_abuse_probability_diff = mean(abuse_probability_diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_abs_abuse_probability_diff = mean(abs(abuse_probability_diff), na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_confidence_diff = mean(confidence_diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_classification_changed = 100 * mean(classification_changed, na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_report_to_cps_changed = 100 * mean(report_to_cps_changed, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

## Save Outputs

```{r}
write_csv(summary_table, summary_path)

plot_df <- paired_results %>%
  mutate(model_label = str_c(provider, "/", model))

p <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = model_label, y = abuse_probability_diff, fill = target_attribute)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  facet_wrap(~ prompt_template) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  labs(
    title = "Paired Difference in Abuse Probability",
    subtitle = "Computed as condition B minus condition A within vignette pair",
    x = "Model",
    y = "Abuse probability difference",
    fill = "Target attribute"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)

ggsave(plot_path, p, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

cat("\nSummary table\n")
print(summary_table, n = nrow(summary_table))

cat("\nSaved summary to:", summary_path, "\n")
cat("Saved plot to:", plot_path, "\n")
```
